EMPTY.DESCRIPTION: There are currently no active auctions matching your search.

ADD_ITEM_PAGE.TITLE: Add New Auction Item
ADD_ITEM_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Fill in the details below to publish your item for auction.

FIELDS.NAME: Item name *
FIELDS.DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: Describe the item's condition, history and details...

IMAGE.TITLE: Item photo
IMAGE.DETAILS: JPG, PNG or WEBP, max 5 MB

VALIDATION.NAME_MIN: Name must be at least 3 characters.
VALIDATION.DURATION: Duration must be between 1 and 30 days.
VALIDATION.IMAGE_TYPE: Only JPG, PNG or WEBP images are allowed.
VALIDATION.IMAGE_SIZE: Image must be smaller than 5 MB.

MESSAGES.SUCCESS_LOCAL: Item successfully published for auction (saved locally - backend not ready).

FOOTER.ABOUT_TEXT_1: BidSphere is a modern online auction platform designed to make buying and selling through bidding simple, secure, and exciting.
FOOTER.ABOUT_TEXT_2: We connect thousands of buyers and sellers across a wide range of categories, offering a transparent and fair bidding process for everyone. Whether you're looking for a great deal or hoping to sell to the right buyer, BidSphere gives you the tools and trust you need to bid with confidence.

NOT_FOUND.TITLE: Oops! Page not found
NOT_FOUND.MESSAGE: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

FORUM.DESCRIPTION: Browse current discussions and participate in conversations with other users.

BID.TITLE: Place Your Bid
BID.LOGIN_TEXT: Sign in to place a bid on this item.

MESSAGES.BID_HIGHER_CURRENT: The bid must be greater than the current price.
MESSAGES.BID_HIGHER_MINIMUM: The bid must be greater than the minimum price.

REVIEWS.TITLE: Reviews
